headline: Bitcoin Surges to $63.2K Amid Global Tensions

headline: A16z Invests $355M in Digital Asset Blockchain Push

headline: Oil Surges 5% on Iran Tensions, Stocks Gain

article.title: Stocks See Cautious Rise as Iran Risks Whipsaw Oil: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Wall Street traders paced a cautious rebound in stocks as beaten-down chipmakers rallied, though lingering worries about an escalation of the Middle East conflict whipsawed the oil market.
